title: Katakuri Forces Luffy Past His Limit
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Katakuri as The escape from Totto Land tightens while Luffy’s duel with Katakuri becomes a test of endurance and will.
scene: The Sunny escape, Sanji’s cake plan, and Luffy’s mirror-world duel all converge under Big Mom’s pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What Island Soft Flour Town

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The chaos com'ti-Nues!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kya A4!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: UWA 64!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Gyaah! That Sur- Prised me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn that straw hat... is he really that strong?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe his fight with Lord dogtooth, of all people, in the mirror world has gone on for this long...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's already 9:30-de Soir.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to think that it's dragged on this long...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The reports of mirrors breaking across the islands won't stop coming in!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Fuffufufu.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Want to hear something interesting, friends?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi, lay off it. Their chance of surviving this will take another hit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What is it, Lady Stussy?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The TAMatebako... you took it from the straw hats, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that big explosion... the box was what caused that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Today, too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You are as perfect and wonderful as always, brother dogtooth! ♙

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And? What's taking so long, snipers?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've been shooting for a while now, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And how many have you hit?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's Nov- Ing around so fast... We can't... damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ugh! You powerless fools!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: AYAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I have 41 older brothers!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And 40 of them have selected me as the winner of their best little sister award! I'm super popular!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Waha haha Ha!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But Brother Katakuri is the favorite of all 38 of his little sisters!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And he's beloved by his little brothers as well! I've got a lot of rivals!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Everyone wants to be dogtooth's favorite!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am the most beloved little sister! I'm the girl that'll become the little sister King!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Charlotte Family, 33rd Daughter (15 years old) Charlotte Flambe (KATAKURI FAN CLUB LEADER AND SPECIAL FORCES CAPTAIN)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm going to help my brother here and score some brownie points!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We underlings want Lord dogtooth to love us, too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We understand, Lady Flambe:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No one gives a crap about you idiots!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: besides... for an enemy to give my brother this much trouble...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No one should bear witness to this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He should always be perfect!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't want anyone to lose their love for him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: gyahaha! You're right!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: truth be told, though, he isn't exactly "having trouble"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's just that his opponent is persistent!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's taken wounds that should have been fatal many times now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And he's been bleeding like a stuck pig!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And yet he gets up every time! Wahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's hilarious!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's pathetic (1)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Just you see, you blood-soaked, filthy monkey!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 51 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s pursuit, the cake delivery, and Luffy’s duel place every escape route under pressure.
